# Data Source (postgresql_user)

Reads information about a PostgreSQL user (a role with LOGIN privilege).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing PostgreSQL user
data "postgresql_user" "app" {
  name = "app_user"
}

output "user_oid" {
  value = data.postgresql_user.app.oid
}

output "user_roles" {
  value = data.postgresql_user.app.roles
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the user.

### Read-Only

- `connection_limit` (Number) Connection limit for the user. -1 means no limit.
- `create_database` (Boolean) Whether the user can create databases.
- `create_role` (Boolean) Whether the user can create other roles.
- `oid` (Number) The OID of the user.
- `replication` (Boolean) Whether the user can initiate streaming replication.
- `roles` (List of String) List of roles that this user is a member of.
- `superuser` (Boolean) Whether the user is a superuser.
- `valid_until` (String) Password expiry time. Empty if no expiry.
